assertionResults.title: should reject unauthenticated request

assertionResults.title: should return dashboard summary for active org

assertionResults.title: should return empty/zero stats for empty org

assertionResults.title: should include overallReadiness in dashboard summary

assertionResults.title: should include craReadiness on each product

assertionResults.title: should return 0 overallReadiness for empty org

assertionResults.fullName: /api/dashboard CRA Readiness Scorecard readiness should match round(met/total * 100) for each product
assertionResults.title: readiness should match round(met/total * 100) for each product

assertionResults.fullName: /api/dashboard CRA Readiness Scorecard overallReadiness should be weighted average across products
assertionResults.title: overallReadiness should be weighted average across products

assertionResults.title: met should never exceed total for any product

assertionResults.title: should include supportStatus on each product

assertionResults.title: supportStatus.status should be a valid value

assertionResults.title: should return not_set with null daysRemaining when no end date

assertionResults.title: should return supportStatus for empty org without error

assertionResults.title: should include nbAssessment field on each product

assertionResults.title: rejects unauthenticated requests

assertionResults.title: rejects access to products in another org

assertionResults.title: returns a valid scorecard structure

assertionResults.title: returns top risks sorted by risk score descending

assertionResults.title: limits top risks to 10

assertionResults.title: returns lightweight summary

assertionResults.title: summary score matches full scorecard
